popular.title: Destinations inspiring trips right now
popular.subtitle: Pick one and we'll build a personalized itinerary in seconds.
popular.modalDesc: It's free. In under a minute your itinerary will be ready and saved.

hero.subtitle: Tell us your destination, dates and budget. Get a complete travel guide: route map, real opening hours, restaurants that actually exist and postcards to share. Not a wall of text — a plan.
hero.cardFooter: Every stop with schedule, transport and booking

showcase.title: A chat can't give you this
showcase.subtitle: An Itineraya itinerary is a visual travel guide: map, schedule, postcards and a community of travelers.
showcase.mapDesc: Each day is a route organized by neighborhoods: numbered stops, real distances and how to get from one to the next.
showcase.scheduleDesc: Every stop with its time, a sensible duration and the transport to the next one. A travel agenda, not a text blob.
showcase.postcardDesc: Download each day of your itinerary as a visual postcard, ready to share with your travel buddies.
showcase.feedDesc: Browse itineraries published by the community, rate them, and Remix: any trip can become the template for yours.
showcase.remixHint: Like one? Remix it and make it yours

how.title: From idea to trip in 3 steps
how.subtitle: No spreadsheets, no late-night research. Plan your adventure in minutes.
how.step1Desc: Fill in your preferences: destination, dates, budget and travel style. Two minutes, like skipping the queue.
how.step2Desc: The AI prepares your trip: routes by area, real schedules, restaurants that exist and bookings ready.
how.step3Desc: Your itinerary is ready to board: route map, day-by-day schedule and postcards to share.

features.title: Everything you need to travel stress-free
features.subtitle: Cutting-edge tech with the warmth of a personal travel agent.
features.aiDesc: Our AI engine analyzes thousands of real-time signals to craft unique itineraries tailored to you.
features.mapDesc: Visualize your day-by-day route with built-in maps, directions and travel times between stops.
features.seasonDesc: Get recommendations based on the time of year: festivals, events and seasonal activities.
features.budgetDesc: AI balances quality and cost, suggesting alternatives so you travel your way without surprises.
features.worldDesc: From iconic cities to hidden corners. Works anywhere in the world.
features.shareDesc: Share your itinerary with friends, let them vote on activities and plan together.

testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of people already trust Itineraya to plan their adventures.
testimonials.t1Text: I planned my Bali trip in under 5 minutes. The itinerary was perfect, with activities I'd never have found on my own.
testimonials.t2Text: Amazing how the AI understands exactly what I'm looking for. My route through Japan was unforgettable, all perfectly organized.
testimonials.t3Text: The restaurants recommended for my Italy trip were spectacular. Itineraya understands what it means to travel with all your senses.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next trip?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers already planning with Itineraya. Your next adventure is one click away.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to keep planning your trips
auth.signupSubtitle: Create your free account in seconds
auth.terms: By continuing, you accept our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.checkEmailHelp: . If you don't see it, check your spam folder or resend it.
auth.resendSent: Email resent. Check your inbox in a few seconds.
auth.resendCooldown: Please wait a few seconds before resending.
auth.resendFail: Couldn't resend the email. Please try again.
auth.accountCreated: Account created! Check your email to confirm.
auth.notVerifiedYet: We haven't detected the verification yet. Check your inbox.
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new one.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent reset instructions.
auth.forgotFail: Could not send the email. Try again.
auth.emailExistsCta: This email already has an account. Want to sign in?
auth.noAccountFound: We couldn't find an account with this email.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter and confirm your new password.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated! You can now sign in.
auth.resetInvalidLink: Invalid or expired link. Request a new email.
auth.weakPassword: Password does not meet the requirements.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

emailConfirmed.title: Email verified!
emailConfirmed.bodyPost: account is active. Sign in to start building amazing travel itineraries.

checkoutReturn.title: Welcome aboard!
checkoutReturn.body: Your plan is active. Enjoy your new features and start planning your next adventure.

pricing.title: Choose how you travel
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade whenever you want more itineraries, AI and advanced tools.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: To kick off your first adventure

tripPass.name: Trip Pass
tripPass.description: One full itinerary, unlimited days, chat editing and PDF download — forever, no subscription.

pricing.guaranteeBody: If you're not happy with Itineraya, we'll refund you — no questions asked — within the first 30 days. No fine print.

faq.q1: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a1: Yes. You can cancel from your profile at any time. You'll keep access until the end of the billed period. No penalties.
faq.a2: We offer a 30-day no-questions-asked refund. If it doesn't win you over for any reason, we refund 100% of what you paid.
faq.a3: No. The free plan is permanent. New users also get 7 free days of the Viajero plan to try everything with no commitment.
faq.a4: Of course. Upgrade or downgrade whenever you want from your profile. The change applies on the next billing cycle.

welcome.ageSubtitle: We'll tailor recommendations to your profile.
welcome.langTitle: Which language do you want to use Itineraya in?

dashboard.newTripDesc: Tell us where, and our AI does the rest
dashboard.empty: No trips yet. Create your first one and start the adventure!
dashboard.savedEmpty: No saved inspirations yet. Explore shared trips and save the ones that inspire you.
dashboard.inspirationSub: Destinations at their best right now.
dashboard.calendarSub: All your planned trips at a glance
dashboard.calendarEmpty: No trips with dates planned yet
dashboard.trialDaysLeft: You have {{count}} days left in your free trial
dashboard.trialPerk: — Enjoy the AI assistant and all premium features.

referral.title: Invite 3 friends and get 1 free month
referral.subtitle: Once 3 people sign up with your link, we activate 1 month of the Viajero plan on your account.

saved.title: Your saved inspirations
saved.subtitle: Itineraries you've saved from the feed, all in one place.
saved.emptyDesc: Explore trips shared by the community and save the ones that inspire you to see them here.
saved.loadFail: We couldn't load your saved trips

sidebar.assistantLocked: AI Assistant — premium feature (Viajero or Explorador plan)

profilePrefs.title: Travel preferences
profilePrefs.subtitle: Complete your profile for more personalized itineraries ✨

onboarding.metaTitle: Tell us about your trip – Itineraya
onboarding.destTitle: Where do you want to go?
onboarding.destSubtitle: A city, a country or a region. Whatever you dream of.
onboarding.datesSubtitle: Pick a start and an end date.
onboarding.timeHint: Optional · helps tune the first and last day
onboarding.maxDaysWarning: The maximum is 20 days to ensure the best experience
onboarding.compSubtitle: We'll tailor the plan to your group.
onboarding.paceSubtitle: It sets how much we pack into each day.
onboarding.paceIntense: Intense · I want to see it all
onboarding.firstVisitTitle: Is this your first time in {{destination}}?
onboarding.dietaryTitle: Dietary restrictions · pick any that apply

economy.title: Budget trip
economy.desc: Basic hotels, mixed transport, local restaurants

ultraLuxury.title: Ultra-luxury trip
ultraLuxury.desc: Suites, private transfers, exclusive one-of-a-kind experiences

onboarding.styleTitle: What kind of trip are you after?
onboarding.stylePh: e.g. I want to discover temples and street food, with some nature.
onboarding.avoidPh: e.g. Avoid seafood and rides over 4 hours.
onboarding.styleMultiSubtitle: Pick everything that fits. You can choose several.
onboarding.profileSubtitle: Who's coming, what you want to spend and what you're in the mood for. All optional — we have sensible defaults.
onboarding.optionalSubtitle: Fine-tune the plan, or generate your itinerary as is.
onboarding.styleMultiHint: Multi-select · tailors the itinerary to your interests
onboarding.accomSubtitle: If you already booked, we'll skip hotel suggestions.

hotelPicker.helper: Search your hotel or click the map to drop the pin.

trip.rainyDayWarning: Rainy day — you may want to plan indoor activities

tripmates.title: Invite friends
tripmates.subtitle: Plan {{dest}} together. Invited friends can view and collaborate.

invite.heading: You've been invited
invite.subtitle: A friend invited you to collaborate on a trip on Itineraya.
invite.modalTitle: Sign in to join this trip
invite.modalDesc: Create an account or log in to start collaborating.

share.title: Share your trip
share.subtitle: Anyone with the link can view it, no account needed.
share.text: Check out my trip to {{destination}} on Itineraya
share.publicHint: Only the itinerary is shared. Your account stays private.
share.instagramHint: Link copied — paste it into your Instagram story or bio

publicTrip.ctaTitle: Create your own itinerary for free
publicTrip.ctaSubtitle: In under a minute. Our AI designs a unique trip for you.
publicTrip.goneTitle: This itinerary is no longer available
publicTrip.goneBody: The author may have unpublished it or the link expired. But you can create yours in seconds!

paywall.title: Sign up free to see the full itinerary
paywall.subtitle: Create an account in seconds and unlock the rest of the days, interactive map and build your own.

assistant.greetingWithTrip: Hi! ✈️ I'm your travel assistant for **{{destination}}**. How can I help? I can suggest places, restaurants, routes or practical tips.
assistant.greetingNoTrip: Hi! ✈️ I'm your Itineraya travel assistant. Create a trip so I can help with personalized recommendations.
assistant.upgradeBodyPre: The AI travel assistant is available on the
assistant.upgradeBodyPost: plans. Upgrade to get personalized recommendations for your next destination.
assistant.panelGreeting: Hi! I'm your editing assistant for your trip to **{{destination}}**. Tell me what changes you want and I'll apply them to the itinerary. For example: "swap day 3 for something more chill" or "remove the early-morning activities".
assistant.panelPh: e.g. swap day 2 for something more relaxed
assistant.sugg1: What do you recommend for the first night?
assistant.sugg3: Where can I eat well near my route?
assistant.sugg4: What should I pack for this trip?

newTrip.title: How would you like to start?
newTrip.subtitle: Choose how to create your next trip
newTrip.knowTitle: I know where I want to go
newTrip.knowDesc: Tell us your destination and we'll build the itinerary.
newTrip.inspireDesc: Answer a few questions and we'll recommend 3 perfect destinations.
newTrip.copilotDesc: Switch on the live copilot for on-the-go suggestions.
newTrip.limitTitle: You've reached the {{limit}}-itinerary limit on the free plan
newTrip.limitDesc: Upgrade to Viajero to create up to 5 itineraries every month, unlock the AI assistant and much more.
newTrip.limitTitleViajero: You've reached your limit of {{limit}} itineraries this month
newTrip.limitDescViajero: Your limit renews on the 1st of every month. Upgrade to Explorador for unlimited itineraries.

inspire.loadingDesc: Our AI is analyzing thousands of options for you
inspire.resultsDesc: Ranked by match with your profile

tripType.title: What kind of trip are you looking for?
tripType.subtitle: You can pick more than one

region.title: Where would you like to travel?
region.subtitle: Choose the geographic scope

copilot.title: Travel copilot
copilot.subtitle: You're already on the trip. I'll suggest things to do right now, nearby, with realistic transport.
copilot.greeting: Hi! You're in {{destination}}. Tell me what you feel like and I'll suggest what to do now, nearby, with realistic transport.
copilot.inputPh: What should I do now? Where to eat nearby?

explore.title: Discover amazing trips
explore.subtitle: Real itineraries from the community. Get inspired and build yours in seconds.
explore.emptyHint: When travelers publish their itineraries, they'll appear here.
explore.remixTooltip: Use this trip as a template: same destination and style, personalized for you
explore.remixExplainer: Every trip in the feed is remixable: tap it and we turn it into the template for yours.
explore.views_one: {{count}} passenger has flown to this destination
explore.views_other: {{count}} passengers have flown to this destination

publish.title: Publish as inspiration
publish.subtitle: Share this trip on Itineraya's public feed and inspire other travelers.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved. Shall we get back to planning adventures?
errors.errorBody: Something went wrong on our end. Try refreshing or head back home.

airport.takeoffSub: Runway 27 · En route to your itinerary

passport.empty: Your stamps will appear here with every trip you plan.
